notes: Proteus 8.13 observed PROJECT.XML TIMESTAMP RELEASE=813 FILEVER=830.

normalization_behaviors: If ROOT.DSN has four resistors and ROOT.CDB has one/minimal metadata, Proteus can show four resistors and rebuild missing metadata on save.
If ROOT.CDB has extra resistor entries but ROOT.DSN has fewer visual objects, extra CDB entries do not create visible schematic objects.
For resistor values, CDB-only edits update displayed/property values after Proteus opens/resaves.
For DSN-only resistor value edits, Proteus can revert displayed values from ROOT.CDB.

known_noise.description: Save/session/timestamp-like noise bytes changed between resaves without meaningful schematic changes.
TIMESTAMP MODIFIED/CREATED-like fields change between saves.
